name: dynamo-trt
_comment_c_serving: 0 µs/seq — Dynamo orchestrator absorbs per-seq host work (block-table gather, sampling, scheduler) into one CUDA-graph launch per microbatch. The irreducible per-seq cost is below the ~µs threshold relative to per-step GPU work. See decode.md §7.2 for the C++/CUDA-graph + orchestrator stack range (5-22 µs/seq nominal; recalibrated to 0 µs post-MLA-migration when DSv3-class TPOT predictions revealed the prior 5 µs over-counted at large B).
_comment_kernel_launch: 7 µs — typical per-kernel dispatch budget for Dynamo+TRT-LLM steady state.
_comment_moe_a2a_pattern: scatter — Dynamo+TRT exposes DeepEP-style scatter-direct dispatch (decode.md §5.2).
